metadata.purpose: CAPEL-style prompt bank for few-shot CLIP/VLM adaptation.
metadata.important_note: This is a generated prompt bank, not the authors' released official JSON. It follows the paper's setting of 50 prompts per class and uses deterministic templates.

paper_instruction_templates: Describe a photo of {y} in one sentence, no more than {length} words.
How does a {y} look like? Answer in no more than {length} words.
Summarize visual features of {y} in no more than {length} words.
Tell me what {y} looks like in a short sentence, less than {length} words.
Use less than {length} words to outline the look of {y}.

metadata.format: datasets[dataset_name].classes is a list of objects with raw class name, display name, and 50 prompts.
metadata.normalization: Underscores and slash-separated class labels are converted to readable prompt text where appropriate.
